calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Receipt Of Any Insurance Proceeds From The Bank Of America Mortgage Insurance
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lynn Searle for and with Scarlett Gordon (Executor). Karen Caldwell for Renzie Smith (Objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Continued To Jan-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Caldwell for Renzi Smith (Objector). Lynn Searle for and with Scarlet Gordon.

The accounting petition/petition for final distribution was continued to January 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to confirm whether there are any insurance policy benefits with Bank of America. Ms. Searle is to provide a status brief with regard to her investigation of the above by January 6, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Continued To Nov-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The matter was continued to November 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by stipulation of counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Caldwell for Renze Smith (Beneficiary).

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Caldwell requested a continuance stating that she filed an objection yesterday. The accounting petition was continued to October 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will notify Counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Suspension Of Powers And To Remove Executor Scarlet Gordon And To Appoint Administrator With Will Annexed
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lynn Searle for Scarlet Gordon (Executor). Karen Caldwell for Renzi Smith.

Counsel stated that they reached an agreement and presented a stipulated written order for the Court's review. The Court read the order into the record and signed it in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
